implementation_notes: Made four targeted changes: (1) Added a MANDATORY LINT COMPLIANCE AC blockquote callout after the Task 1 template in research-to-implementation-template.md Section 5, and a DO NOT CREATE STANDALONE QUALITY GATE TASKS blockquote at the end of Section 5 before Section 6. (2) Added lint compliance guidance and standalone QG task prohibition to the Section 5 explanation in research-template.md, referencing FEAT-6CE9 evidence as requested. (3) Added a CRITICAL instruction block in feature-plan.md after the consumer_context rule (line ~1909), consistent with the existing CRITICAL instruction style already present in that step. (4) Created tests/planning/test_lint_ac_compliance.py with 11 integration tests across three test classes: TestLintComplianceInACs (4 tests), TestNoStandaloneQualityGateTasks (3 tests), and TestQualityGateGeneratorWithLintCommands (4 tests). The helper function _is_standalone_qg_task is careful to exclude tasks with 'implement', 'generator', 'create', 'build', 'add' in their name to avoid false positives on tasks like 'Implement Quality Gate Generator'. All instructions are stack-agnostic, referencing 'lint/format checks' not specific tools.
requirements_addressed: Research template prompts include instructions to add lint/format compliance to every implementation task's ACs
Research template prompts include explicit instruction to NOT create standalone quality gate verification tasks
Instruction is stack-agnostic — references lint compliance generically, not specific tools like ruff
Existing feature plan parsing (spec_parser.py) continues to work without modification
Quality gate generator (quality_gate_generator.py) continues to aggregate lint commands from individual task ACs
Integration test verifies generated feature plan includes lint compliance in task ACs and does not contain standalone quality gate tasks

completion_promises.criterion_text: Research template prompts include instructions to add lint/format compliance to every implementation task's ACs
completion_promises.evidence: Added MANDATORY LINT COMPLIANCE AC blockquote callout after the task template in docs/templates/research-to-implementation-template.md Section 5 (after line 201). Added parallel guidance in docs/guides/research-template.md Section 5 explanation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Research template prompts include explicit instruction to NOT create standalone quality gate verification tasks
completion_promises.evidence: Added DO NOT CREATE STANDALONE QUALITY GATE TASKS blockquote at the end of Section 5 in docs/templates/research-to-implementation-template.md (before Section 6). Added matching prohibition in docs/guides/research-template.md Section 5 explanation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The instruction is stack-agnostic — references lint compliance generically, not specific tools like ruff
completion_promises.evidence: All added instructions say 'project-configured lint/format checks' and explicitly note not to reference specific tools like ruff, eslint, biome. The test test_lint_ac_text_is_stack_agnostic verifies this property for parsed tasks.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Existing feature plan parsing (spec_parser.py) continues to work without modification
completion_promises.evidence: spec_parser.py was not touched. The integration test uses parse_research_template() from spec_parser.py and it works correctly with the new test fixtures (11/11 tests pass).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Quality gate generator (quality_gate_generator.py) continues to aggregate lint commands from individual task ACs
completion_promises.evidence: quality_gate_generator.py was not touched. Three tests in TestQualityGateGeneratorWithLintCommands verify it still works: generates YAML correctly, includes lint gates, and deduplicates lint commands across tasks.

completion_promises.criterion_text: At least one integration test verifies that a generated feature plan includes lint compliance in task ACs and does not contain standalone quality gate tasks
completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/planning/test_lint_ac_compliance.py with 11 tests. test_implementation_tasks_have_lint_ac parses a full research spec and asserts every implementation task has a lint AC. test_compliant_spec_has_no_standalone_qg_tasks asserts no standalone QG tasks exist. test_standalone_qg_task_is_detected verifies the counter-example spec is correctly identified.
